# source: https://github.com/jupyterlab/jupyterlab/issues/7095
# repo: jupyterlab/jupyterlab
# title: Jupyterlab manager extension returns 500 -local server
# 
# <!--
# Welcome! Before creating a new issue:
# * Search for relevant issues
# * Follow the issue reporting guidelines:
# https://jupyterlab.readthedocs.io/en/latest/getting_started/issue.html
# -->
# ## Description
# <!--Describe the bug clearly and concisely. Include screenshots if possible-->
# Note: this is a local server on my personal computer as opposed to within a Docker container or an AKS deployed JupyterHub
# I updated Jupyterlab to 1.0.9 recently and since then whenever I open the extension manager in the UI this returns a 500 error. For reference the full message on the UI:
# While the message on my terminal results on:
# ## Reproduce
# <!--Describe step-by-step instructions to reproduce the behavior-->
# 1. Launch JupyterLab
# 2. Click on the Extension manager tab
# <!-

[E 09:04:52.229 LabApp] 500 GET /lab/api/extensions?1566828290456 (::1) 1395.35ms referer=http://localhost:8888/lab?
[I 09:04:52.231 LabApp] Build is up to date
[E 09:04:53.165 LabApp] Uncaught exception GET /lab/api/extensions?1566828290490 (::1)
    HTTPServerRequest(protocol='http', host='localhost:8888', method='GET', uri='/lab/api/extensions?1566828290490', version='HTTP/1.1', remote_ip='::1')
    Traceback (most recent call last):
      File "/anaconda3/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tornado/web.py", line 1699, in _execute
        result = await result
      File "/anaconda3/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tornado/gen.py", line 742, in run
        yielded = self.gen.throw(*exc_info)  # type: ignore
      File "/anaconda3/lib/python3.7/site-packages/jupyterlab/handlers/extension_manager_handler.py", line 216, in get
        extensions = yield self.manager.list_extensions()
      File "/anaconda3/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tornado/gen.py", line 735, in run
        value = future.result()
      File "/anaconda3/lib/python3.7/site-packages/tornado/gen.py", line 748, in run
        yielded = self.gen.send(value)
      File "/anaconda3/lib/python3.7/site-packages/jupyterlab/handlers/extension_manager_handler.py", line 95, in list_extensions
        description=pkg_info['description'],
    KeyError: 'description'
